features: 【Colorful Wrapping Paper Birthday Roll Set】This wrapping paper birthday roll set includes 3 brilliant blue designs, each 43cm by 3m. Bright colors and festive prints make every gift pop for girls' birthdays or special celebrations.

【Durable and Smooth Wrapping Paper】Made of thick and tear-resistant material, our wrapping paper is smooth, durable, and crease-free. Ideal for any birthday wrapping paper roll use with clean edges and easy cutting.

【Perfect for Girls Birthday Gifts】Each roll features cute prints perfect for girls. Compared to boys wrapping paper, this pink style adds charm and elegance to birthday parties, baby showers, or holiday gift wrapping.

【Multi-Use Wrapping Paper Roll】More than just for birthdays, this wrapping paper roll is great for weddings, Christmas, baby showers, and party decorations. Also suitable for creative crafts and scrapbooking.

【Eye-Catching Gift Wrap for All Ages】With vivid patterns and versatile use, this birthday wrapping paper is a standout choice. Whether for girls or boys wrapping paper birthday needs, it brings fun and festive flair to every gift.
